Femke Bol winning the 4x400m relay final at the European Athletics Championships in Rome on June 12.

PHOTO: REUTERS

PublishedГӮJun 16, 2024, 03:00 PM

UpdatedГӮJun 16, 2024, 11:16 PM

ROMEГўВҖВ“Femke Bol, fresh from two golds and a bronze at JuneГўВҖВҷs European championships, admits she is looking forward to what she says will be a ГўВҖВңnice battleГўВҖВқ with American arch-rival Sydney McLaughlin-Levrone at the Paris Olympics.

Bol was one of the stars of the championships in Rome,dominating her speciality event, the 400m hurdles,and going on to anchor the womenГўВҖВҷs 4x400m relay team to victory, while also picking up third place in the mixed relay.

The Dutchwoman won Olympic 400m hurdles bronze in the delayed Tokyo Games in 2021, when McLaughlin-Levrone claimed gold in a then-world record of 51.46 seconds.

The American bettered that in June 2022 at the US trials in Eugene by 0.05sec before taking it down to 50.68sec when winning gold at the world championships on the same track later that year.

She missed the 2023 world championships through injury and Bol won.

ГўВҖВңI hope itГўВҖВҷs going to be a nice battle,ГўВҖВқ Bol said. ГўВҖВңI will try to be at my best form I can be and then we will see where it will bring us.ГўВҖВқ

Many track fans believe the duoГўВҖВҷs clash will be one of the main attractions of the Paris athletic schedule.

ГўВҖВңI hope so. That would be great,ГўВҖВқ Bol said.

Bol, like McLaughlin-Levrone, is also a talented performer over 400m flat.

At the European championships in Munich in 2022, Bol won gold in that event as well as the hurdles and in March set a new world record in winning world indoor gold over 400m in Glasgow.

But the 24-year-old will not be running the 400m flat in Paris: ГўВҖВңOnly the hurdles and the relay.ГўВҖВқ

Femke Bol with her 400m hurdles gold medal during the European Athletics Championships in Rome on June 11.

PHOTO: AFP

While Bol was in action in Rome, McLaughlin-Levrone showcased her versatility in New York by setting a world-leading time of 48.75sec over the 400m on June 9.

Before that, she set a then world-leading 52.70sec in her first 400m hurdles race for nearly two years in Atlanta on May 31. Bol lowered that to 52.49sec when winning in Rome.

McLaughlin-Levrone may not have run her signature event since August 2022, but there were no signs of rust. It sets up the 400m hurdles battle in Paris very nicely.

ГўВҖВңItГўВҖВҷs great sheГўВҖВҷs there and it will always be exciting and always bring some nice nerves,ГўВҖВқ said Bol of her 24-year-old opponent.

ГўВҖВңBut at the same time, IГўВҖВҷm really focused on myself. IГўВҖВҷm always just trying to be a better athlete and then I just hope it will bring something nice to be battling with her.ГўВҖВқ

Bol said Rome had been a useful stepping stone towards the Olympics.

ГўВҖВңItГўВҖВҷs very important. I mean, a European championships is a European championships, itГўВҖВҷs always big,ГўВҖВқ she said.

ГўВҖВңItГўВҖВҷs always something extra when you race on a big tournament, and itГўВҖВҷs only my second 400 hurdles race of the season.ГўВҖВқ

Bol said she appreciated the adrenaline rush and the time that she and her coach will now have to examine technique and strategy ГўВҖВңto put some more pieces of the puzzle togetherГўВҖВқ.

Bol let slip one of her race tactics.

ГўВҖВңFor me, I visualise IГўВҖВҷm running towards someone. It always helps me a lot, but when you have a loud atmosphere like here in Rome, it also helps a lot.ГўВҖВқ

Fans will wait to see whether Bol, come Paris, will need to visualise a person at the end of the home straight or will the shadow of her nemesis prove enough incentive.

Meanwhile, two-time Olympic champion Faith Kipyegon said she is looking forward to a bright summer in Paris, after winning the 1,500m and 5,000m at the Kenyan Olympic trials in Nairobi.

Faith Kipyegon winning the 1,500m at the Kenyan Olympics trials in Nairobi on June 15.

PHOTO: AFP

Despite not competing since last September, the 30-year-old secured her Paris ticket in both distances with a seasonГўВҖВҷs best performance.

A day after winning the 5,000m in 14min 46.28sec, the Rio and Tokyo Games 1,500m champion demonstrated her mastery of the distance on June 15, setting the track ablaze in 3:53.98.

ГўВҖВңI wanted to run 3:55, but it was surprisingly 3:53. IГўВҖВҷm excited to be back on the track and executing this way,ГўВҖВқ said Kipyegon, who also holds the 1,500m world record.AFP, REUTERS

title: Femke Bol predicts ГўВҖВҳnice battleГўВҖВҷ with Sydney McLaughlin-Levrone at Paris Olympics | The Straits Times
description: The duoГўВҖВҷs 400m hurdles clash could be one of the main attractions of the Paris athletics schedule. Read more at straitstimes.com.
